    serial # prefix "AF"

12.08.1978
    signatures:
    
    signature title at right correctly spelled as "GUVERNER"
clearly visible year of Tito's death at left on front: 1980

Tito's year of death at left on front appearing as 1930
    
    Remark on "Error" notes:
    In fact there are no real error notes, at least not so far the plate is 
    concerned.
    All notes show Tito's year of death correctly (1980, and not 1930)
    The reason why some notes may appear as printing errors at first sight is a 
    small impurity in the numeral 8 of 1980, which could be read as a "3" when 
    not having a closer look. However, this is due to a kind of &q
